message:
fix(combinator): clarify retry predicate call with explicit variable binding

Extract should_retry result into a named variable before combining with
has_attempts_remaining() check. The retry attempt counter is a plain u32
passed by value — the intermediate binding makes the control flow clearer
and avoids any confusion about the predicate receiving the correct value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
